name: okta_login_without_push_marker
description: Login from a device whose user agent does not end with the org's expected Okta Verify Push marker.

validation.notes: TEMPLATE. The Panther rule has no event-type scope and relies on a custom, environment-specific Push marker (placeholder PS_mxzqarw). As written it would match nearly all traffic. Replace the marker with the org's real value and confirm the event-type scope before deploying.
